text:
skreuzer    2011-01-14 23:00:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-TheSchwartz-Worker-SendEmail Makefile distinfo 
                                          pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  TheSchwartz is a reliable job queue system. This perl module can pull
  jobs from the queue to send email out via SMTP.
  
  PR:             ports/152386
  Submitted by:   Kurt Lidl <kurt.lidl@cello.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
